# elizaos-plugins/registry Daily Update (Apr 19, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development activity on April 19, 2026, focused on expanding the ecosystem through the submission of new plugin integrations. No code changes, bug fixes, or documentation updates were merged during this period.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS
*   **Plugin Ecosystem Expansion**
    *   The registry received submissions for two new plugins, indicating ongoing growth in community-contributed integrations. Relevant PRs: [#347](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/347), [#346](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/346).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#347](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/347): Add @error403agent/elizaos-plugin-deepblue
*   [#346](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/346): Add @elisym/plugin-elizaos

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None

## NEW ISSUES
*   None

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None
